title: elaphrium rubrum
intro: Elaphrium rubrum, also known as the Red Elaphrium, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Elaphrium rubrum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases. Elaphrium rubrum is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
